title: VP & Director of Marketing & Communications
notes: VP & Director of Marketing & Communications at CMT. Holds executive buying authority for marketing and BD engagements. Key gatekeeper — Konner needs her direction before proceeding. Roger Austin's former colleague in the Marketing leadership. Not yet engaged directly.

key_facts: Executive buying authority for marketing and BD engagements.
Konner Dudley is waiting on her direction before moving forward on the proposal automation engagement.
